g.text: Graph Transformations of y = f(x) — Summary
y = f(x) + a → Shift UP by a
y = f(x) - a → Shift DOWN by a
y = f(x + a) → Shift LEFT by a
y = f(x - a) → Shift RIGHT by a
y = af(x) → Vertical stretch, factor a
Rule: Changes INSIDE f( ) affect x (horizontal, opposite)
Changes OUTSIDE f( ) affect y (vertical, as expected)
